input.command:
echo "=== namespace ==="; kubectl get ns elasticsearch -o yaml | head -30
echo "=== existing resources ==="; kubectl -n elasticsearch get all,configmap,secret,pdb 2>&1
echo "=== secrets detail ==="; kubectl -n elasticsearch get secret es-http-tls -o jsonpath='{.data}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(list(d.keys()))"
echo "=== storageclass ==="; kubectl get storageclass
echo "=== nodes ==="; kubectl get nodes

content.text: vm.max_map_count is already 262144 on the node — no privileged init container needed. Let me clean up the debug pod and check the test pods' mounts.

input.command:
kubectl get pod -A | grep node-debugger
kubectl delete pod node-debugger-karma-7-control-plane-t84qk 2>&1
echo "---curl-test volumes---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch get pod curl-test -o jsonpath='{.spec.volumes}'; echo
echo "---openssl-toolbox volumes---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch get pod openssl-toolbox -o jsonpath='{.spec.volumes}'; echo
echo "---elastic-password---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch get secret elastic-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d; echo

input.subject: Verify HTTPS reachability via es-http and read/write

content.content: Task #3 created successfully: Verify HTTPS reachability via es-http and read/write

task.subject: Verify HTTPS reachability via es-http and read/write

input.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: es-config
  namespace: elasticsearch
data:
  elasticsearch.yml: |
    cluster.name: es-cluster
    node.name: ${POD_NAME}
    network.host: 0.0.0.0
    http.port: 9200
    transport.port: 9300
    discovery.seed_hosts:
      - es-discovery
    cluster.initial_master_nodes:
      - es-node-0
      - es-node-1
      - es-node-2
    node.roles: ["master", "data", "ingest"]
    path.data: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data

    ingest.geoip.downloader.enabled: false

    xpack.security.enabled: true
    xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: true
    xpack.security.http.ssl.certificate: certs/tls.crt
    xpack.security.http.ssl.key: certs/tls.key
    xpack.security.http.ssl.certificate_authorities: ["certs/ca.crt"]
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: true
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.verification_mode: certificate
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.certificate: certs/tls.crt
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.key: certs/tls.key
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.certificate_authorities: ["certs/ca.crt"]

input.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: es-node
  namespace: elasticsearch
spec:
  serviceName: es-discovery
  replicas: 3
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: elasticsearch
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: elasticsearch
    spec:
      initContainers:
        - name: fix-certs
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command:
            - bash
            - -c
            - |
              cp /tls-source/tls.crt /certs/tls.crt
              cp /tls-source/tls.key /certs/tls.key
              cp /tls-source/ca.crt /certs/ca.crt
              chown 1000:1000 /certs/tls.crt /certs/tls.key /certs/ca.crt
              chmod 600 /certs/tls.key
              chmod 644 /certs/tls.crt /certs/ca.crt
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 0
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tls-source
              mountPath: /tls-source
            - name: certs
              mountPath: /certs
        - name: fix-data-perms
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command:
            - bash
            - -c
            - chown -R 1000:1000 /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 0
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
      containers:
        - name: elasticsearch
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 1000
            runAsGroup: 1000
          env:
            - name: POD_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.name
            - name: ELASTIC_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: elastic-password
                  key: password
            - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
              value: "-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9200
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9300
              name: transport
          volumeMounts:
            - name: config
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
              subPath: elasticsearch.yml
            - name: certs
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs
              readOnly: true
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: 1Gi
              cpu: 250m
            limits:
              memory: 1536Mi
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 9200
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 12
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 9200
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 20
            failureThreshold: 6
      volumes:
        - name: tls-source
          secret:
            secretName: es-http-tls
        - name: certs
          emptyDir: {}
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: es-config
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        storageClassName: standard
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 5Gi

content.content: File created successfully at: /tmp/es-statefulset.yaml (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

kind: StatefulSet

  replicas: 3

  selector:
    matchLabels:

  template:
    metadata:

    spec:
      initContainers:
        - name: fix-certs
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command:

              cp /tls-source/tls.crt /certs/tls.crt
              cp /tls-source/tls.key /certs/tls.key
              cp /tls-source/ca.crt /certs/ca.crt
              chown 1000:1000 /certs/tls.crt /certs/tls.key /certs/ca.crt
              chmod 600 /certs/tls.key
              chmod 644 /certs/tls.crt /certs/ca.crt
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 0
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tls-source
              mountPath: /tls-source
            - name: certs
              mountPath: /certs
        - name: fix-data-perms
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          command:
            - bash
            - -c
            - chown -R 1000:1000 /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 0
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
      containers:
        - name: elasticsearch
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 1000
            runAsGroup: 1000
          env:
            - name: POD_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.name
            - name: ELASTIC_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: elastic-password
                  key: password
            - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
              value: "-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9200
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9300
              name: transport
          volumeMounts:
            - name: config
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
              subPath: elasticsearch.yml
            - name: certs
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs
              readOnly: true
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: 1Gi
              cpu: 250m
            limits:
              memory: 1536Mi
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 9200
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 12
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 9200
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 20
            failureThreshold: 6
      volumes:
        - name: tls-source
          secret:
            secretName: es-http-tls
        - name: certs
          emptyDir: {}
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: es-config
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        storageClassName: standard
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 5Gi

input.command: kubectl apply -f /tmp/es-configmap.yaml && kubectl apply -f /tmp/es-services.yaml && kubectl apply -f /tmp/es-statefulset.yaml
